regions.name: The Revived Isles
regions.blurb: Twelve small repos reborn as distinct, working MVPs.

portals.name: JoshCoach
portals.desc: Local-first daily micro-coach: check-in, cards, reflections, streak.

portals.name: JoshHub-Local
portals.desc: Local-first life dashboard: links, notes, tasks, routines, health.

portals.name: random-play
portals.desc: Serendipity launcher — pick a vibe, get a random pick.

portals.name: realms-atlas
portals.desc: This fantasy portfolio world map + launcher.

portals.name: StarHaven
portals.desc: Original tiny space RPG — 3 missions, 6 endings.

portals.name: Wild2
portals.desc: Original wilderness fantasy RPG — 4 classes, 5 endings.

portals.name: AnchorFlow
portals.desc: Calm focus flow: anchor, ground, focus timer, close.

portals.name: JoshChess
portals.desc: Beginner/kid chess mini-trainer (companion to the main Chess app).

portals.name: skills
portals.desc: IT support skill-tree tracker with confidence + evidence.

portals.name: Waypoint
portals.desc: Decision navigator: overwhelm to one clear next step.
